asana.summary: Asana CLI over the REST API — read/create/comment-on tasks and subtasks, @mention, manage tags, board sections, dependencies, and the API-only machine-state field.

askproject.summary: Bridge to a coding agent in ANOTHER project — spawn a headless peer (claude or codex) in a target project, fenced by mode (read/act), and return its answer with cost, token, and files-changed traceability.

automations.summary: Project-local scheduler and subprocess runner with versioned config, SQLite run history, concurrency, retries, timeouts, and cancellation.

callva.summary: CallVA voice-AI platform CLI over the External API — read/create/update/delete agents, assets (prompts), calls, transcripts, recordings, call analytics, custom fields, webhook schedules, automations (Windmill scripts), webhook logs, variables, settings, projects, phone numbers, and providers.

clickup.summary: ClickUp CLI over the REST API — read/create/update/comment-on tasks and subtasks, complete via status, manage assignees, tags, dependencies, custom fields, attachments, and webhooks across spaces and lists.

coolify.summary: Coolify CLI over the REST API — list projects/resources/servers, read application & service status and logs, and deploy/restart/stop/start them on a self-hosted Coolify instance.

deployment.summary: Project deployment standard - declare runtime services, target providers, references, and capability locks without depending on any one deployment adapter.

directo.summary: Directo ERP CLI over the browser-session endpoints its web UI uses — log in, select a location, and read the authed `*.asp` surface (sales, purchases, stock, ledger). Stateful — run `directo doctor` first.

emta.summary: Estonian Tax Board (maasikas.emta.ee) read-only CLI — prepay balances, per-period balances, prepay ledger. Session is paste-fed from a logged-in browser. Stateful — run `emta doctor` first.

fathom.summary: Fathom CLI over the External API + a PostgreSQL store — sync meetings and transcripts in one pass, read/update stored meetings, manage a vocabulary, and search the store at three levels.

geminitalk.summary: Gemini Live native-audio project companion with continuous duplex audio, bounded project tools, optional headless Codex delegation, and an active Codex-thread relay.

ical.summary: Calendar.app CLI over macOS Automation — read and write events across Calendar.app's configured calendars (calendars, events, show, search, freebusy, create, update, delete). Writes are gated by the connection's policy (scope + allow_write); auth is the one-time macOS Automation grant, no credential on disk.

mail.summary: Mail.app CLI over macOS Automation — read/search mail across configured accounts, show a message, save attachments, draft (never send), and export a mailbox to JSON.

mailbox.summary: Thin IMAP/SMTP CLI for mailboxes — list/show messages, save attachments, render PDF, save raw .eml, flag `\Seen`, move between folders, and send.

notion.summary: Notion CLI over the REST API — publish markdown to pages: list child pages, fetch a page as markdown, replace a page's body and title, create under a parent, and upsert by exact title.

railwayc.summary: Credential harness around the official `railway` CLI — resolves a project-scoped Railway token, injects it, and forwards your command straight to `railway` (everything but railwayc's own verbs passes through untouched); the command surface is `railway help`.

routine.summary: Routine CLI for project repeatable procedures — list, validate, and render `.routines` recipes.

simplbooks.summary: SimpleBooks accounting CLI over a browser session (no public API) — read clients/invoices/purchases/accounts/bank-transactions/financial_transactions, create invoices & purchase invoices, record payments/incomings, post balanced journal entries, stage bank payment orders, and process the PSD2 bank worklist. Stateful — run `simplbooks doctor` first.

stripe.summary: Read-only Stripe CLI over the REST API — emit a neutral JSON contract of account activity (sync-plan), check identity/reachability (doctor), list invoices and download their PDFs, and read balance-transactions and payouts.

telegram.summary: Telegram CLI over a personal MTProto account — read/search a chat, send, export history to JSON, transcribe voice/audio. Stateful — run `telegram doctor` first.

vapic.summary: Connection harness around the official `vapi` CLI - resolves a Vapi API key, injects it, and forwards commands to `vapi` with a narrow read-list fallback; the command surface is `vapi --help`.

whatsapp.summary: WhatsApp CLI over a self-hosted WAHA bridge — list chats, read/export a chat's history to JSON with voice/audio + photos, and transcribe voice notes. Run `whatsapp doctor` first to confirm the instance is reachable and the session is linked.

windmill.summary: Windmill CLI over the REST API — deploy scripts, attach cron schedules, run jobs, read run history/logs, and manage secret variables and folders.

youtrack.summary: YouTrack CLI for discovering projects, creating and reading issues, reading or adding comments, and updating issue state.
